RuleSet.Name: src/schemapub/ISchemaPubTableH.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 public interface for a $TableName$ history object

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaPubTableHJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub

RuleSet.GenRule: public $implJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $implJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $implJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
$declPubRecHPKeyAccessors$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declPubRecHPKeyAttrAccessors empty empty )$$declPubRecHDataGetterSetters$
extends I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$H
public void set( I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Pub$reference BaseClass TableName$ src );$declPubRecHSetRecH$
public void set( I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Pub$reference BaseClass TableName$H src );
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declPubRecHSetRec$ public void set$TableName$( I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$ src );$declPubRecHSetDefRecH$
